2026-04-09T01:04:15.5159517Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-09T01:04:15.5166341Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-09T01:04:15.5167060Z 
2026-04-09T01:04:15.5167838Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-09T01:04:15.5173596Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-09T01:04:15.5174203Z 
2026-04-09T01:04:15.5174487Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-09T01:04:15.5176771Z

2026-04-09T01:04:15.5222902Z
